product: Okta support for automatic identity management is now generally available ​
tagline: July 3, 2026 Okta support for automatic identity management is now generally available.
what_it_does: July 3, 2026 Okta support for automatic identity management is now generally available. Automatic identity management lets you sync users and groups from Okta into Databricks without SCIM provisioning.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.

capabilities.title: July 3, 2026 Okta
capabilities.desc: July 3, 2026 Okta support for automatic identity management is now generally available.

key_takeaway: July 3, 2026 Okta support for automatic identity management is now generally available.
